ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of experiment (e.g., LHRS, RHRS) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the experiment */,
  "leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead researcher */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the experiment */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lhrs_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each LHRS run */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the run belongs to */,
  "run_number" INTEGER /* Run number of the LHRS */,
  "coda_run" INTEGER /* CODA run number */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the run */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the run */,
  "detector_status" TEXT /* Status of the LHRS detector during the run */,
  "beam_energy" TEXT /* Energy of the beam used during the run */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data collected during the run */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or remarks about the run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lhrs_runs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rhrs_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each RHRS run */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the run belongs to */,
  "run_number" INTEGER /* Run number of the RHRS */,
  "coda_run" INTEGER /* CODA run number */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the run */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the run */,
  "detector_status" TEXT /* Status of the RHRS detector during the run */,
  "beam_energy" TEXT /* Energy of the beam used during the run */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data collected during the run */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or remarks about the run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rhrs_runs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "harp_a_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Harp A setting */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the setting belongs to */,
  "harp_a_entry_no" REAL /* Harp A entry number */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the setting */,
  "beam_position" REAL /* Position of the beam during the setting */,
  "beam_intensity" REAL /* Intensity of the beam during the setting */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or remarks about the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_harp_a_settings_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "harp_b_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Harp B setting */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the setting belongs to */,
  "harp_b_entry_no" REAL /* Harp B entry number */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the setting */,
  "beam_position" REAL /* Position of the beam during the setting */,
  "beam_intensity" REAL /* Intensity of the beam during the setting */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or remarks about the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_harp_b_settings_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "x_position" INTEGER /* X-position of the experiment */,
  "y_position" INTEGER /* Y-position of the experiment */,
  "z_position" INTEGER /* Z-position of the experiment (if applicable) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hardware_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hardware configuration */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the configuration belongs to */,
  "hardware_type" TEXT /* Type of hardware used */,
  "configuration" TEXT /* Configuration details of the hardware */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the hardware */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the hardware */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the hardware */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or remarks about the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hardware_configurations_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "software_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each software configuration */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the configuration belongs to */,
  "software_type" TEXT /* Type of software used */,
  "configuration" TEXT /* Configuration details of the software */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the software */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date of installation */,
  "license_key" TEXT /* License key for the software */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or remarks about the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_software_configurations_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, engineer, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment data */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or remarks about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions_used" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position used */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the position usage */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the position usage */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or remarks about the position usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hardware_used" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "hardware_type" TEXT /* Type of hardware used */,
  "hardware_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hardware used */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the hardware usage */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the hardware usage */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or remarks about the hardware usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "hardware_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "software_used" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "software_type" TEXT /* Type of software used */,
  "software_id" INTEGER /* ID of the software used */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the software usage */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the software usage */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or remarks about the software usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "software_id")
)
